test.name: TC_01: Login Success with Valid Credentials

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\iTservice\\Document\\FEMS_AutomationTest\\testsuite\\Shipping\\browser\\traces\\temp\\a58f8a9a-336c-4459-b0d4-b7c8e1297ff6"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://uataotfems.netbay.co.th/fems/#/auth/shipping/login
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'trainingship' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Netbay@123' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'xpath=//*[@title="Login"]'.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
kw.msg: Slept 3 seconds

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
kw.msg: Closed browser

test.doc: ทดสอบกรณีกรอกรหัสผ่านและ Username ถูกต้อง ระบบต้องเข้าสู่ระบบสำเร็จ

test.name: TC_02: Login Fail when Password is Empty

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Closed browser

test.doc: ทดสอบกรณีไม่กรอกรหัสผ่าน ระบบต้องแสดง Tooltip แจ้งเตือนสีแดง
